# Meteocons static SVG subset

This directory contains a small vendored subset of `@meteocons/svg-static` for the tinymash Weather plugin.

- Upstream: https://github.com/basmilius/meteocons
- Package: `@meteocons/svg-static`
- Version used: `0.1.0`
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE`

Only the static filled SVG icons needed for the first Open-Meteo weather-code mapping are included.
